title: Artificial Intelligence Adoption in SMEs: Survey Based on TOE–DOI Framework, Primary Methodology and Challenges
description_es: Este artículo proporciona una encuesta comprensiva sobre la adopción de IA en pequeñas y medianas empresas, analizando factores tecnológicos, organizacionales y ambientales.
abstract: Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) face unique challenges in adopting artificial intelligence. This survey analyzes AI adoption through the lens of the Technology-Organization-Environment (TOE) framework combined with diffusion of innovations (DOI) theory, providing actionable insights and a practical adoption roadmap for SMEs.

citations.apa: Sánchez, E., Calderón, R., & Herrera, F. (2025). Artificial Intelligence Adoption in SMEs: Survey Based on TOE–DOI Framework, Primary Methodology and Challenges. Applied Sciences, 15(12), 6465.
citations.mla: Sánchez, Esther, et al. "Artificial Intelligence Adoption in SMEs: Survey Based on TOE–DOI Framework, Primary Methodology and Challenges." Applied Sciences, vol. 15, no. 12, 2025, p. 6465.

contributions: Comprehensive AI adoption framework for SMEs
